title: Dragon Egg Power
description: This plugin adds new cool features and abilitys to the dragon egg
body:
🐉 DragonEggPowers

⚡ Ability:

Press Shift+F to summon a lightning strike on yourself, granting 1m30s buffs:
🔥 Fire Resistance, 💪 Strength II, ⚡ Speed II, 🛡️ Resistance I, ❤️ Absorption II

Creates a 16-block domain that strikes enemies with custom lightning:

Effects: Weakness II, 💜 Purple Glow, Hunger II, Blindness, Slowness II (30s)

Players are struck up to 4 times in 15s and freeze 5s

Domain follows you; trusted players are immune



🛡️ Passive Ability:

If below 3 hearts:

Knockback blast (0 dmg, 10 blocks)

10s immortality: Saturation II, Black Glow, Resistance V



⏱️ Cooldowns:

Ability: 5 min | Immortality: 15 min

Kill → resets all cooldowns


✨ Other:

Name appears black in chat/tab with dragon egg

Custom sounds for all actions

20 hearts while having the dragon egg in your inventory

📝 Commands:

/dragoneggpower:attack → alternative to Shift+F

/dragonpower:trust → trust players to avoid lightning

/dragonpower resetcooldown → reset ability & immortality cooldowns


⚙️ Configurable Options:

❄️ Freeze duration for lightning hits

🌈 Player name color while holding dragon egg

⏲️ Ability & immortality cooldowns

💀 Buff durations and strengths

⚡ Domain size and lightning effects
